completeness.notes: Hand-drafted to back the curated tool layer (build_swap_tx, build_bridge_tx, get_transfer_status, list_chains, list_tokens). Covers /v1/quote, /v1/status, /v1/chains, /v1/tokens. Skipped: /v1/connections, /v1/tools, /v1/quote/toAmount, /v1/advanced/routes, /v1/advanced/stepTransaction, /v1/gas/suggestion. Response schemas are loose object types — LI.FI returns rich nested objects whose exact shape varies per route; the curated tool layer pulls what it needs.
